name: Simplified Filing via Form 1040-SR

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have attained age 65 as of the close of the taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Individuals age 65 or older can use a simplified tax form (1040-SR) regardless of the amount of taxable income or types of common income like Social Security or capital gains.
